vocab.meaning: một cỗ máy thời gian tinh túy/điển hình
vocab.example: I consider a mechanical watch to be a quintessential timepiece that transcends fleeting fashion trends.
Wearing a sleek wristwatch helps exude an air of professionalism during high-stakes business meetings.
I’ve recently embraced technological integration by switching to a smartwatch that tracks my fitness metrics.

vocab.meaning: kỷ vật gia truyền đầy ý nghĩa tình cảm
vocab.example: I occasionally wear an old pocket watch, which is a sentimental heirloom passed down from my great-grandfather.

vocab.meaning: trở nên lỗi thời trong kỷ nguyên số
vocab.example: Some might argue that analog watches are becoming obsolete in the digital age, but I still value their craftsmanship.
